inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total delivery distance. Based on standard logistics metrics (WERC).

inputs.label: Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Package weight. Influences fuel consumption and handling cost. ISO 9001 quality standards.

inputs.label: Volume (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Package volume. Used for dimensional weight pricing. Industry standard (IATA, UPS).

inputs.label: Delivery Mode
inputs.businessContext: Service level. Express and same-day incur premium. Based on logistics service tiers.

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current fuel price. Major variable cost. Source: local fuel index.

inputs.label: Vehicle Efficiency (km/L)
inputs.businessContext: Fuel economy of delivery vehicle. ISO 50001 energy management.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Driver wage including benefits. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS).

inputs.label: Delivery Time (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Total time from dispatch to delivery. Affects labor cost. Lean time measurement.

inputs.label: Number of Stops
inputs.businessContext: Number of delivery points. Affects time and fuel. Route optimization metric.

inputs.label: Handling Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Warehouse and loading cost. Based on activity-based costing (ABC).

inputs.label: Insurance Rate (% of value)
inputs.businessContext: Insurance premium as percentage of cargo value. Risk management standard.

inputs.label: Cargo Value
inputs.businessContext: Declared value of goods. Used for insurance calculation.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Quality of input data. Adjusts final cost for uncertainty. Six Sigma data integrity.

thresholds.fuelCostPerLiter > 2: Fuel cost is high; consider route optimization.
thresholds.vehicleEfficiency < 8: Vehicle efficiency low; consider maintenance or replacement.
thresholds.handlingCostPerKg > 2: Handling cost high; review warehouse processes.
thresholds.insuranceRate > 2: Insurance rate high; check risk factors.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 0.7: Low data confidence; results may be unreliable.

suggestedActions: Optimize route to reduce distance and fuel cost.
Improve vehicle maintenance to increase efficiency.
Consolidate deliveries to reduce number of stops.
Review labor scheduling to reduce overtime.
Improve data collection for higher confidence.
